name: self-healing-infrastructure-mcp
description: AI-powered self healing infrastructure MCP server for agents. Supports node health check, cluster health check, restart service. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: node_health_check
tools.description: Check health of infrastructure nodes including CPU, memory, disk, and services.

tools.name: restart_service
tools.description: Restart a failed service with automatic rollback on repeated failures.

tools.name: cost_report
tools.description: Generate infrastructure cost report with breakdown by service, region, and resource.

tools.name: auto_remediate
tools.description: Automatically remediate common infrastructure issues using predefined playbooks.
